definition.config: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="config_start" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><next><block type="config_category"><field name="name">game</field><statement name="write"><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">kick</field><field name="comment">是否允许踢出玩家 Whether  are allowed to kick the player</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">kick</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">ban</field><field name="comment">是否允许封禁玩家 Whether allowed to ban players</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">ban</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">crash</field><field name="comment">是否允许崩溃 Whether allowed to crashed</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">crash</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">always_online</field><field name="comment">是否将你视为拥有正版账号的玩家，即使你是离线账号玩家 Whether to consider you as an Online player, even if you are an Offline player</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">always_online</field><field name="value">false</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">undefined_chat</field><field name="comment">是否允许玩家与Undefined聊天 Whether players are allowed to chat with Undefined</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">undefined_chat</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">allow_flickering_screen</field><field name="comment">是否允许屏幕闪烁（癫痫患者不要开启） Whether screen flickering is allowed (do not turn on in people with epilepsy)</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">allow_flickering_screen</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement><next><block type="config_category"><field name="name">event</field><statement name="write"><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">event_interval</field><field name="comment">事件发生的间隔 The interval at the time of the event</field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">event_interval</field><field name="value">35000</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">max_event_speed</field><field name="comment">事件发生的最大速度 The maximum speed at which the event occurs</field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">max_event_speed</field><field name="value">2</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">min_event_speed</field><field name="comment">事件发生的最小速度 The minimum speed at which the event occurs</field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">min_event_speed</field><field name="value">0.5</field></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></statement><next><block type="config_category"><field name="name">entity</field><statement name="write"><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">undefined_damagecap</field><field name="comment">Undefined Boss的限伤 The maximum damage the Undefined Boss can receive</field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">undefined_damagecap</field><field name="value">20</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">missing_damagecap</field><field name="comment">穿戴Missing盔甲的玩家最大可以受到的伤害 The maximum damage that a player wearing missing armor can receive</field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">missing_damagecap</field><field name="value">50</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">spawn_entity</field><field name="comment">是否允许实体生成 Is entity spawn allowed</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">spawn_entity</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">replace_to_glowing_obsidian</field><field name="comment">是否允许实体替换水为发光的黑曜石 Is entity replace water to glowing obsidian allowed</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">replace_to_glowing_obsidian</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">breakblock</field><field name="comment">是否允许实体破坏方块 Whether entities are allowed to destroy blocks</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">breakblock</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement><next><block type="config_category"><field name="name">misc</field><statement name="write"><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">remove_technical_entity_blacklist</field><field name="comment">模组实体移除技术性实体的黑名单 Blacklist of technical entities removed by mods</field><value name="value"><block type="config_textlist_variable"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="1"></mutation><field name="name">remove_technical_entity_blacklist</field><field name="entry0">touhou_little_maid:tombstone</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">watchdog_crashtime</field><field name="comment">Watchdog过去多少tick后会崩溃 After how many ticks will the watchdog crash</field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">watchdog_crashtime</field><field name="value">1200</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">trash_log</field><field name="comment">是否在模组加载时记录日志 Whether to log an entry when the mod is loaded</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">trash_log</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
